name: New Critical Temptation Target Detected
notes: This rule triggers when a new critical temptation target is detected.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Attack Surface Management
when the event matches Temptation (custom) is not N/A
when the event matches Temptation (custom) is greater than or equal to 40
when any of Target ID (custom) are contained in any of Critical Temptation Target - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
TD_list: APPLY New Critical Temptation Target Detected on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Attack Surface Management
AND when the event matches Temptation (custom) is not N/A
AND when the event matches Temptation (custom) is greater than or equal to 40
AND NOT when any of Target ID (custom) are contained in any of Critical Temptation Target - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
RED_list: Event name: New Critical Temptation Target Detected
Event description: Detects a new critical temptation target.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Target ID (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
Add the "Target ID" of the event or flow payload to the Reference Set "Critical Temptation Target"
Remove "Target ID" from Reference Set: "High Temptation Target"
